spec_match.rationale: The page now names the actual modulepreload destinations, contrasts regular preload, and surfaces MIME, SRI, credentials, and later-import reuse rules.

interactive.rationale: Type chips, rel/MIME/import controls, live contract cards, a generated Blob-backed preload probe, presets, copy actions, and a waterfall comparison make this hands-on.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature-index blurb promises a tag builder with timing, presets, copyable output, and critical-path comparison; the page still delivers those and adds contract checks.

edge_cases.rationale: The contract lab covers wrong Content-Type, regular rel=preload contrast, missing later import, destination mismatch, integrity metadata, and credentials-key waste.

references.rationale: The concept-level see-also section links directly to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5202661416763392.

design_system.rationale: The concept uses CSS variables for colours, keeps local button backgrounds paired with colours, avoids raw hex, and is no longer a static-card pattern.

summary: The major missing-reference finding is fixed, and the builder now directly demonstrates JSON/style modulepreload behavior plus key failure modes. No follow-up questions remain for this concept.
